content:
# Saq Sandstone

**Summary**: A major Cambrian-Ordovician clastic unit in the Arabian Platform.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-mohammedfaiz|Mohammedfaiz, 2014]] analyzed the saq-sandstone to determine its internal members (Risha and Sajir) and depositional history.

## Depositional Environment

- [[2014-mohammedfaiz|Mohammedfaiz, 2014]] fluviatile to shallow marine

## Reservoir Properties



## Key Findings Across Sources

- The Saq Sandstone is divided into Risha and Sajir members, showing a transition from fluviatile to marine environments. ([[2014-mohammedfaiz|Mohammedfaiz, 2014, p. 51]])
